# SEO Maintenance Checklist

## Before Each Deployment

- [ ] Update sitemap.xml lastmod dates
- [ ] Verify all meta tags are current
- [ ] Check that project images have proper alt text
- [ ] Test Open Graph preview on Facebook Debugger
- [ ] Test Twitter Card preview
- [ ] Run Lighthouse SEO audit (aim for 90+)
- [ ] Verify canonical URL is correct
- [ ] Check robots.txt is accessible

## Monthly Tasks

- [ ] Review Google Search Console for errors
- [ ] Check Core Web Vitals scores
- [ ] Update structured data if role/skills change
- [ ] Monitor page load speed
- [ ] Review and update meta descriptions if needed

## When Adding New Projects

- [ ] Add descriptive alt text to project images
- [ ] Update keywords if using new technologies
- [ ] Consider adding project-specific structured data
- [ ] Update sitemap if adding new pages

## Performance Monitoring

- [ ] Google Search Console: Track impressions and clicks
- [ ] Google Analytics: Monitor traffic sources
- [ ] PageSpeed Insights: Check performance scores
- [ ] Mobile-Friendly Test: Ensure mobile compatibility

## Quick Wins

1. Share portfolio on social media regularly
2. Add portfolio link to GitHub profile
3. Include portfolio in email signature
4. Submit to developer directories (Dev.to, Hashnode, etc.)
5. Engage with tech communities and share work
